Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5

Class Json5TokenReader

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.JsonTokenReader
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.Json5TokenReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, RecordReader, TokenReader
Direct Known Subclasses:
Json5lTokenReader
public class Json5TokenReader extends JsonTokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON5 format.

Subclasses JsonTokenReader to add the JSON5 dialect's relaxations:

  • Strings can be single-quoted, double-quoted, or unquoted bare identifiers.
  • Field names can be single-quoted, double-quoted, or unquoted bare identifiers.
  • Trailing commas before ] / } are allowed.
  • Missing values in arrays / objects emit TokenType.VALUE_NULL.
  • JavaScript comments (// line, /* */ block) are tolerated — already accepted by the parent class.

The cursor is a true O(1)-memory streaming cursor (TokenReader.isStreaming() == true).

Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe.
  • The cursor is purely structural; object swaps and @Schema annotations have no effect. Use the POJO databind path on Json5Parser for those.

  • Constructor Details

    • Json5TokenReader

      public Json5TokenReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException
      Constructor with default settings.
      Parameters:
      pipe - The parser input pipe to read from. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.

    • Json5TokenReader

      public Json5TokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings, Json5ParserSession session) throws IOException
      Constructor used by Json5ParserSession.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling session through so that JsonTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the JSON5 databind path.
      Parameters:
      pipe - The parser input pipe to read from. Must not be null.
      settings - The cursor-level settings. Must not be null.
      session - The Json5ParserSession for JsonTokenReader.read(Class) delegation, or null to disable read.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.

  • Method Details

    • allowsTrailingComma

      protected boolean allowsTrailingComma()
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      Subclass extension point: returns whether trailing commas are accepted before ] / }.

      Default returns false (strict RFC-8259 JSON). Json5TokenReader overrides this to return true for the JSON5 dialect.

      Overrides:
      allowsTrailingComma in class JsonTokenReader
      Returns:
      true if a trailing comma should be silently accepted; false if it should produce a parse error.

    • readValueStart

      protected void readValueStart(int c) throws IOException, ParseException
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      State-machine dispatch: handles the next character at JsonTokenReader.S00_expectValue.

      Subclasses (e.g. Json5TokenReader) override this to add dialect-specific value shapes (single-quoted strings, bare identifiers, missing-value handling).

      Overrides:
      readValueStart in class JsonTokenReader
      Parameters:
      c - The next non-whitespace, non-comment character read from the input.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading from the underlying stream.
      ParseException - If the input is malformed at this position.

    • readFieldNameOrEndObject

      protected void readFieldNameOrEndObject(int c) throws IOException, ParseException
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      State-machine dispatch: handles the next character at JsonTokenReader.S01_expectFieldName.

      Subclasses (e.g. Json5TokenReader) override this to accept bare-identifier field names and single-quoted field names.

      Overrides:
      readFieldNameOrEndObject in class JsonTokenReader
      Parameters:
      c - The next non-whitespace character read from the input.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading from the underlying stream.
      ParseException - If the input is malformed at this position.

    • readCommaOrEndArray

      protected void readCommaOrEndArray(int c) throws IOException, ParseException
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      State-machine dispatch: handles the next character at JsonTokenReader.S04_expectCommaOrEndArray.

      Subclasses (e.g. Json5TokenReader) override this to accept trailing commas before ].

      Overrides:
      readCommaOrEndArray in class JsonTokenReader
      Parameters:
      c - The next non-whitespace character read from the input.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading from the underlying stream.
      ParseException - If the input is malformed at this position.

    • readCommaOrEndObject

      protected void readCommaOrEndObject(int c) throws IOException, ParseException
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      State-machine dispatch: handles the next character at JsonTokenReader.S03_expectCommaOrEndObject.

      Subclasses (e.g. Json5TokenReader) override this to accept trailing commas before }.

      Overrides:
      readCommaOrEndObject in class JsonTokenReader
      Parameters:
      c - The next non-whitespace character read from the input.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading from the underlying stream.
      ParseException - If the input is malformed at this position.

    • readString

      protected String readString() throws IOException, ParseException
      Description copied from class: JsonTokenReader
      Reads a double-quoted JSON string from the current input position.

      Handles escape sequences (\\n, \\t, \\uNNNN, etc.) inline via ParserReader.replace(char). Subclasses (e.g. Json5TokenReader) override this to also accept single-quoted strings.

      Overrides:
      readString in class JsonTokenReader
      Returns:
      The parsed string (without surrounding quotes).
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading from the underlying stream.
      ParseException - If the input is malformed at this position.
